title: eria ridleyi
intro: Eria ridleyi, also known as the Ridley's orchid or the Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the Eastern Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eria ridleyi include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Eria ridleyi can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
